title: anchusa iranica
intro: Anchusa iranica, also known as Persian bugloss, is a perennial herb belonging to the Boraginaceae family, native to the mountainous regions of Iran. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Anchusa iranica include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of Anchusa iranica typically involve drying and infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water to create a tea, or using the plant's extracts to make capsules or tinctures.
